title: Market Research & Competitor Analysis
description: Conduct comprehensive market research to identify target audience, analyze competitor platforms (Amazon, Shopify stores), and define unique value propositions for our e-commerce platform.

title: Product Catalog Requirements
description: Define product catalog structure, categories, attributes, pricing models, and inventory management requirements. Include support for variants, bundles, and digital products.

title: User Experience Design & Wireframes
description: Create user journey maps, wireframes, and high-fidelity mockups for customer-facing pages including homepage, product pages, cart, checkout, and user account areas.

title: Database Schema Design
description: Design comprehensive database schema for products, users, orders, payments, inventory, reviews, and analytics. Include proper indexing and relationship mapping.

title: Frontend Component Library
description: Develop reusable React components for product cards, filters, search, navigation, forms, and responsive layouts. Implement design system and accessibility standards.

title: Product API Development
description: Build RESTful APIs for product management, search, filtering, and recommendations. Include pagination, caching, and rate limiting.

title: Shopping Cart & Session Management
description: Implement shopping cart functionality with persistent sessions, guest checkout support, and cart abandonment recovery features.

title: Payment Gateway Integration
description: Integrate multiple payment providers (Stripe, PayPal, Apple Pay) with secure tokenization, fraud detection, and PCI compliance measures.

title: User Authentication & Profiles
description: Implement secure user registration, login, password recovery, and profile management with social login options and email verification.

title: Order Management System
description: Build comprehensive order processing workflow including order creation, status tracking, inventory updates, and notification system.

title: Search & Filtering System
description: Implement advanced product search with filters, sorting, autocomplete, and search analytics. Include Elasticsearch integration for performance.

title: Unit Testing Suite
description: Develop comprehensive unit tests for all components, APIs, and business logic. Achieve 90%+ code coverage with automated test reporting.

title: Performance Testing & Optimization
description: Conduct load testing, optimize database queries, implement caching strategies, and ensure the platform can handle 1000+ concurrent users.

title: Security Audit & Penetration Testing
description: Perform comprehensive security testing including SQL injection, XSS, CSRF protection, and data encryption validation.

title: Production Deployment Setup
description: Configure production environment with CI/CD pipeline, monitoring, logging, backup strategies, and disaster recovery procedures.

title: Analytics & Reporting Dashboard
description: Implement comprehensive analytics tracking for sales, user behavior, conversion rates, and business intelligence reporting.

title: Mobile App Optimization
description: Optimize the platform for mobile devices with responsive design, touch interactions, and progressive web app features.

title: Live Monitoring & Health Checks
description: Set up real-time monitoring, alerting, health checks, and automated scaling for production environment.
